content: Yesterday I accidentally caught the tail end of Boston Bitdown (chiptune, vgm, & nerdcore fest) at Aeronaut in Somerville. Peppin was just finishing up as I arrived. There was code on the screen. Here's a video of theirs: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OXIpbrvFxfE - LIVECODING INTERNET MUSIC with PEPPIN
